calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Feb-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica appeared by zoom for Alice Lin (petitioner/trustee).

The court stated that it read the petition, that it thought it was pretty straightforward, and that it considered doing some type of a pre-grant on it, but it wanted to leave it on calendar just to make sure that nobody was coming in to object. There being no objections, the Petition for Instructions is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Continued To Feb-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
